hook: Social ease is easier to believe when your lifestyle shows actual contact with other humans.
body: Regular environments where people know you and where conversation happens naturally create visible confidence.

hook: Trying to look socially skilled in one-off dates is harder when your normal life gives you no practice.
body: The quietest way to become more attractive is often to become more embedded in life.

hook: The quietest way to become more attractive is often to become more embedded in life.
body: Third places, classes, volunteer work, and recurring hobbies build a different kind of confidence than staying isolated until date night.
